question: [File: 'File Name: pinger/mirror_node_client.go -> Scope: Medium: Impacts caused by griefing with no economic damage to any user on the network'] [Function: fetchMirrorNodeNetwork()] Can an unprivileged external user serve a mirror REST response with a JSON body containing a nodes array where serviceEndpoints have IPAddressV4 values set to broadcast addresses (e.g., 255.255.255.255), causing the pinger to build a network map with broadcast addresses and grieve SDK connectivity without economic damage?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/mirror_node_client.go -> Scope: Medium: Impacts caused by griefing with no economic damage to any user on the network'] [Function: fetchMirrorNodeNetwork()] Can an unprivileged external user serve a mirror REST response with a JSON body containing a nodes array where serviceEndpoints have DomainName values containing URL-encoded characters or percent-encoding that survive strings.TrimSpace() and are passed raw to net.JoinHostPort(), producing malformed addresses that corrupt the network map?
